note: SNG-063 — BACKGROUND is WHAT YOU DID, orthogonal to WHO YOUR PEOPLE ARE (origin). A Cogitant can be a soldier; a Marcher can be a healer — and both are more interesting than the obvious pairing. Expanded from the 5 hardcoded in app.js. Authored by Aevi 2026-07-11.

backgrounds.name: Former Professional
backgrounds.description: Pre-Transition career skills, and the connections that came with them — some of which still answer.
backgrounds.gmHint: Knows procedure, paperwork, and who to call. Uneasy with how little of it still works.

backgrounds.name: Community Organizer
backgrounds.description: You held a group of people together through something. It worked, mostly.
backgrounds.gmHint: Reads a room's factions instantly. Cannot stop trying to fix them.

backgrounds.name: Craftsman / Artisan
backgrounds.description: Making, mending, material sense. Your hands know things your mouth cannot explain.
backgrounds.gmHint: Assesses everything by how it was made. Physically pained by shoddy work.

backgrounds.name: Survivalist
backgrounds.description: You have been cold, hungry, and alone, and you came back, and you know exactly what that took.
backgrounds.gmHint: Always knows the exits, the water, and how many days of food. Finds comfort suspicious.

backgrounds.name: Medical Practitioner
backgrounds.description: You have had your hands inside someone who was dying. Sometimes it worked.
backgrounds.gmHint: Triages automatically, including people who did not ask. Does not flinch, and that unsettles people.

backgrounds.name: Soldier / Guard
backgrounds.description: You carried a weapon for someone else's reasons and you were good at it.
backgrounds.gmHint: Reads violence before it arrives. Sleeps badly. Does not talk about the one that went wrong.

backgrounds.name: Scholar / Archivist
backgrounds.description: You spent years with the records, and you know how much of what everyone believes is simply not in them.
backgrounds.gmHint: Cites sources unprompted. Genuinely delighted by a primary document. Distrusts a story with no paper.

backgrounds.name: Trader / Merchant
backgrounds.description: Roads, prices, and the exact moment a deal turns. You have been cheated and you learned from it.
backgrounds.gmHint: Prices everything reflexively, including favors. Knows what a thing is worth to THIS person, which is different.

backgrounds.name: Smuggler / Thief
backgrounds.description: You moved what was not supposed to move. You were caught once, and only once.
backgrounds.gmHint: Notices the locks, the sightlines, the guard's habits. Cannot walk into a room without casing it.

backgrounds.name: Storyteller / Performer
backgrounds.description: You have held a room. You know that the true thing and the thing they will listen to are not always the same, and you have made your peace with that.
backgrounds.gmHint: Instinctively shapes events into narrative. Sometimes the shaping is the lie.

backgrounds.name: Farmer / Herder
backgrounds.description: Seasons, soil, animals, and the specific patience of people who cannot hurry the thing they depend on.
backgrounds.gmHint: Unhurried in a way that infuriates cities. Right about the weather. Right about the animal.

backgrounds.name: River-Runner
backgrounds.description: The Valley's waterways, the crossings, the currents. You have pulled people out and you have failed to.
backgrounds.gmHint: Reads water the way others read faces. Uncomfortable far from it.

backgrounds.name: Street-Raised
backgrounds.description: Nobody raised you and you raised yourself, and you are not going to make a speech about it.
backgrounds.gmHint: Trusts slowly and completely. Very hard to shock. Hoards small things.

backgrounds.name: Devotee
backgrounds.description: You gave years to a practice, an order, or a certainty — and you either kept it or you did not, and either way it shaped you.
backgrounds.gmHint: Has a discipline. Keeps it, or misses it. Reacts strongly to other people's faith.

backgrounds.name: Ruin-Picker
backgrounds.description: You went into the Precursor places and came out with things, and you are still here, which puts you in a small category.
backgrounds.gmHint: Fearless about old tech in a way that alarms sensible people. Has an unexplained scar and a rule about doors.
